textByHash.2d3630bede846bdf8248a6606d52ca7b615f5b5a: Hello there. My name is Cromperty. I am a wizard, and an inventor.
textByHash.0002a829bb54fb7735174ad4c3d135a64f9caf62: You must be . My good friend Sedridor has told me about you. As both wizard and inventor, he has aided me in my great invention!
textByHash.a9c4e00c22ba2876c7aad312556c282fb0cb6cc4: Why would he want to be a statue?
textByHash.6113ae6debb4a2265b912158e75f17d9749abbed: Oh yes, I see now. Why are you telling me all this?
textByHash.2a787c6bcc2664ed1d6335b24f69786736332abc: Oh, well, I don't know anything about rocks. I'm a teleportation expert, myself. But there was this one time I teleported a girl right into a rock. What a mess that was.
textByHash.6a3fe7af30366a7417b5730a45da61edf435460c: Oh were you? Of course you were. Well, I suppose being turned into a statue is very similar to being teleported into a rock. Let me see what we'll need.
textByHash.ad7adeb87aeeffd54e393326e7d7d370c35afeb8: If my calculations are correct, this spell will need a bit more 'oomph' than last time around.
textByHash.1b5097cf65543d7b35cc94e188b57740e71cda8c: Well, before you were simply reanimating the person within the rock. This time you need to unravel Morgan Le Faye's spell first.
textByHash.f896e1b5750fe5b6123e11941dbc8bc8ee01c3bb: You'll need King Arthur's most prized possession. That will unravel Morgan's spell. Then you'll need a piece of granite, the same rock Arthur was turned into.
textByHash.597c487aa8267068a209c8b22bee4213c4b4f04c: Let me just get that spell scroll for you...
textByHash.aa930d90617aed2c57b6be6aa892f39275a60bd5: Oh, it looks like you still have the scroll I gave you.
textByHash.9faf8668fced526107bbdadb37b35216de43855c: Take the scroll, the Holy Grail and a piece of granite, any amount will do, to the statue of King Arthur. Once in front of him, read the scroll and the magic should do the rest.
textByHash.c9cf60f784c9e2ac5ae630c889e71eba11670d8c: Where is King Arthur being kept, anyway?
textByHash.6f145b61847de45846985eac7e759446ac39ed6e: Well, that should still get you into the fortress, but I imagine you'll need a better disguise than that to reach King Arthur. He's a very important person and will be well guarded by the Black Knights.
textByHash.bad4e77937f24d25e126ef81fa9b06a82315e081: Hmm...I wonder...if you used a magical object that turned you into stone on the statue, would it turn him back to being human? I must research that...
textByHash.37bc0abda608e56fdabe1ccd176cebe7a14b1f13: Oh, are you still here? Go on then, you've got a king to save!
textByHash.856d180d7ddb9c1ee03fa21bce2cb9998ced36be: Why hello, , what can I do for you?
textByHash.21535ef3877f0910b3c6d820c5c89acdd96a39b3: Take the scroll, the Holy Grail and a piece of granite, of any size, shape or weight, to the statue of King Arthur. Once in front of him, read the scroll and the magic should do the rest.
textByHash.8371906e2f01870519b7bb90efd9680e894a3fd2: How should I know, I'm just a simple wizard.
textByHash.4a87d1405d8a4aca85cdd4058eee818ebb2bc6bf: However, from what you said about having to wear a helm and chainmail, it sounds like you were disguised as a mere guard.
textByHash.6352c79dc56d76be88b6cf1ab7bfa20a6ab3c6da: Well, King Arthur's statue wouldn't be trusted to mere guards. Only fully-fledged Black Knights will guard it. So you'll need to disguise yourself as one of them if you want to get access to the statue.
textByHash.38c0bb7efcc61f9a650a128731199ec9e40f2f9d: What? I have no clue what you're talking about! Now, please excuse me! I need to get back to my experiments!
textByHash.9d2eaf541e6aaf2eb1e6e620a520a61e6de1fb48: Oh dear, it's such a bother getting them back out of the rock walls and I do loathe the trip to Port Khazard for the components.
textByHash.9a89e09dac3dc80220c328515594475059bfef5e: Well, it's not the first time someone's been teleported into a rock face, just the slightest miscalculation and bang...they're in the wall!
textByHash.9022cb019a26752eb9c097682ee6a4e4df3715a8: It's fairly straightforward to cast a spell and fish them out again - but it requires a spell component from a chap in Port Khazard.
textByHash.f13eb3111223502b5b4f4da46d3008262e9cef15: I don't suppose you could do me a small favour could you?
textByHash.f4e47a191b77fd0ccbe3bb884abcf9d35570890a: Just one small favour? Pop along to Port Khazard and get some iron oxide, it's a component of the spell.
textByHash.e08ba7f0b92e2a4b00252a67952ce3fcb04b81b0: Oh dear, what a shame...I just don't have time to deal with this now...she's safe where she is for now, and I'm sure I'll get to it sooner or later.
textByHash.47f9cd16bfe2d7214543fbcc46be8dc218d2eb9a: Waaahaaay! Great! I'd never suspect you'd be so helpful!
textByHash.3ba45f181b716c42ae3d30d6bf13b7571dce2762: You need to talk to a chap called Tindel Marchant in Port Khazard, he's sort of like an antiques dealer.
textByHash.123abacd29f57cda21d335ba016f0ff1e3b06665: Well, off you go then! A journey of a thousand miles starts with the first step and all that!
textByHash.1927816ecb0fe65be4631dede2e056c32141faad: Of course not...you silly...just...you know...the sooner you start the sooner you can get back...that's all I was saying.
textByHash.8d9d01c8203f5f1c81c86fa3f8f81099608310b3: Go to Port Khazard and get me some iron oxide from Tindel Marchant.
textByHash.c5a3874990b78c1f53c1719d226ad9c18882deb0: Great! Just what I needed! Now I need to give you a spell scroll to help bring Petra back again.
textByHash.3a39563f03bcd4e7cfa9375f3222e47e569e74ee: Just cast this in the room, it should have her out of that rock in a jiffy! Good luck with your exploits...now, where was I with that wranklin severance device...
textByHash.a65201021c65ed859e87a951ba763cd767900e74: I suspected that you might...you can have one, but it will cost you 100 gold pieces.
textByHash.55794d85a2f58280e89dff69ceb6c33e8cfb2e36: So you can't have the spell then can you!
textByHash.16efe06b02e0af99f3f24698c4d996099660d40b: Well, I did give you the last one for free...you're not getting another one for free, even if it is my mess that you're trying to clear up! You shouldn't be so careless to leave things lying around!
textByHash.c672d163bfcadd4ca5b0a0e3fe9baf654a217758: Thanks...try not to lose it this time.
textByHash.55e224f0c274d14070703f665a1d781475e44136: Ah! My latest invention is my patent pending teleportation block! It emits a low level magical signal, that will allow me to locate it anywhere in the world, and teleport anything
textByHash.738cd9cc789b9911bf0bfce291313c7bd247a643: directly to it! I hope to revolutionise the entire teleportation system! Don't you think I'm great? Uh, I mean it's great?
textByHash.cb19185d0ed4a8322675922b060eb896f9dba78a: Well... Hmm. I would guess somewhere between here and the Wizards' Tower in Misthalin. All I know is that it hasn't got there yet as the wizards there would have contacted me.
textByHash.c065c7797f67e8ca420ccdb2f1f852d99b3ae8ac: I'm using the GPDT for delivery. They assured me it would be delivered promptly.
textByHash.2ad33fc24d228c7f5a6714721d2fb47e49251047: The Gielinor Parcel Delivery Team. They come very highly recommended. Their motto is: 'We aim to deliver your stuff at some point after you have paid us!'
textByHash.94ea0acba267daa9cb0d105945a38294a841b13f: By all means! I'm afraid I can't give you any specifics as to where you will come out however. Presumably wherever the other block is located.
textByHash.fa1625108111916518c7a639bf87e8f6a2fd1a1a: Yes it is isn't it? Forgive me for feeling a little smug, this is a major breakthrough in the field of teleportation!
textByHash.065e14a4f2f6638414109bada9b9d94b56264b66: There you go, free pure essence. Return tomorrow for some more.
textByHash.d66f417f1517292e936d12c3f836103075e3ce8f: I've already given you your free allowance for today. Come back to me tomorrow for some more.
textByHash.ebe8d65d8b9b140211f7afa93fbe4fc7e38a70ba: Not when you combine them it isn't! I invent MAGIC things!
textByHash.4ae17c0ae78c8b2b8573f5a9941fcf35f47f219a: Thanks for dropping by! Stop again anytime!
textByHash.1111d3dd47dbd56ff2a5873f693ec8bbb347cbac: Hmmm.... that's odd... I can't seem to get a signal...
textByHash.4149cc6bd9249f1ceb30e4957fa4d864e8485819: Your magical prowess... it is most impressive.
